'''rawovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zealoter|zealoter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zealoter|zealoter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rawovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræweveth|ræweveth]] || [[word:ræwevej|ræwevej]] || [[word:ræwevesh|ræwevesh]] || [[word:ræweve|ræweve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rawowovoth|rawowovoth]] || [[word:rawowovoj|rawowovoj]] || [[word:rawowovosh|rawowovosh]] || [[word:rawowovo|rawowovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rawovoth|rawovoth]] || [[word:rawovoj|rawovoj]] || [[word:rawovosh|rawovosh]] || [[word:rawovo|rawovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rawofvoth|rawofvoth]] || [[word:rawofvoj|rawofvoj]] || [[word:rawofvosh|rawofvosh]] || [[word:rawofvof|rawofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rawovotho|rawovotho]] || [[word:rawovojo|rawovojo]] || [[word:rawovosho|rawovosho]] || [[word:rawovoko|rawovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rawovoth|rawovoth]] || [[word:rawovoj|rawovoj]] || [[word:rawovosh|rawovosh]] || [[word:rawovo|rawovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rawovothol|rawovothol]] || [[word:rawovojol|rawovojol]] || [[word:rawovoshol|rawovoshol]] || [[word:rawovokol|rawovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rawovothotho|rawovothotho]] || [[word:rawovojojo|rawovojojo]] || [[word:rawovoshosho|rawovoshosho]] || [[word:rawovoko|rawovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rawovothon|rawovothon]] || [[word:rawovojon|rawovojon]] || [[word:rawovoshon|rawovoshon]] || [[word:rawovokon|rawovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rawovothoro|rawovothoro]] || [[word:rawovojoro|rawovojoro]] || [[word:rawovoshoro|rawovoshoro]] || [[word:rawovokoro|rawovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
